    A

    addAnimal(Animal) - Method in class main.ZooManager
    Adds an animal to the zoo.
    Animal - Class in animals
    Abstract class representing a generic Animal.
    Animal() - Constructor for class animals.Animal
    Constructor to initialize an animal with default values.
    animals - package animals
     

    C

    Cat - Class in animals
    Class representing a Cat, which is a type of Animal that can walk and hunt.
    Cat() - Constructor for class animals.Cat
    Constructor to initialize a Cat with species variable set.

    D

    Dog - Class in animals
    Class representing a Dog, which is a type of Animal that can walk and hunt.
    Dog() - Constructor for class animals.Dog
    Constructor to initialize a Dog object with default attributes.

    F

    flee() - Method in class animals.Mouse
    Makes the mouse flee by increasing its location.
    flee() - Method in interface interfaces.Prey
    Makes the prey animal flee.

    G

    getAnimal(int) - Method in class main.ZooManager
    Gets the animal at the specified index.
    getLocation() - Method in class animals.Animal
    Gets the location of the animal.
    getSpecies() - Method in class animals.Animal
    Gets the species of the animal.

    H

    hunt(Animal) - Method in class animals.Cat
    Makes the cat hunt a specified prey animal.
    hunt(Animal) - Method in class animals.Dog
    Makes the dog hunt a specified prey animal.
    hunt(Animal) - Method in interface interfaces.Predator
    Makes the predator hunt a specified prey animal.

    I

    interfaces - package interfaces
     
    isAlive() - Method in class animals.Animal
    Checks if the animal is alive.

    K

    kill() - Method in class animals.Animal
    Kills the animal, setting its alive status to false.

    L

    listAnimals() - Method in class main.ZooManager
    Lists all animals in the zoo with their index and species.

    M

    main - package main
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class main.Main
     
    Main - Class in main
     
    Main() - Constructor for class main.Main
     
    makeAllSounds() - Method in class main.ZooManager
    Makes all animals in the zoo make their respective sounds.
    makeSound() - Method in class animals.Animal
    Makes the animal produce its characteristic sound.
    makeSound() - Method in class animals.Cat
    Makes the cat produce its characteristic sound.
    makeSound() - Method in class animals.Dog
     
    makeSound() - Method in class animals.Mouse
    Makes the mouse produce its characteristic sound.
    Mouse - Class in animals
    Class representing a Mouse, which is a type of Animal that can walk and flee.
    Mouse() - Constructor for class animals.Mouse
    Constructor to initialize a Mouse with species variable set.

    P

    Predator - Interface in interfaces
    Interface representing predator behavior.
    Prey - Interface in interfaces
    Interface representing prey behavior.

    R

    revive() - Method in class animals.Animal
    Revives the animal, setting its alive status to true.

    S

    setLocation(int) - Method in class animals.Animal
    Sets the location of the animal.
    setSpecies(String) - Method in class animals.Animal
    Sets the species of the animal.

    W

    walk(int) - Method in class animals.Cat
    Makes the cat walk a specified distance.
    walk(int) - Method in class animals.Dog
    Makes the Dog walk a specified distance.
    walk(int) - Method in class animals.Mouse
    Makes the mouse walk a specified distance.
    walk(int) - Method in interface interfaces.Walkable
    Makes the animal walk a specified distance.
    Walkable - Interface in interfaces
    Interface representing walkable behavior.
    walkAll(int) - Method in class main.ZooManager
    Makes all walkable animals walk a specified distance.

    Z

    ZooManager - Class in main
    Class to manage a collection of animals in a zoo.
    ZooManager() - Constructor for class main.ZooManager
    Constructor to initialize the ZooManager with an empty list of animals.
